name: Mac Wiseman
abstract: Malcolm Bell "Mac" Wiseman (May 23, 1925 – February 24, 2019) was an American bluegrass and country singer active for seven decades in the twentieth century. He was part of Bluegrass music's earliest generation, though bluegrass never defined him.

concerts.label: Johnny Cash and The Tennessee Two
New York Folk Festival: Grassroots to Bluegrass to Nashville Part 1

about_quotes.speaker: Woody Herman
about_quotes.evidence: I recorded a couple of very, very old songs with a legendary figure down in Nashville by the name of Mac Wiseman
